Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Given table event_log case_id activity timestamp We need to For each case_id get ordered sequence of activities by timestamp This can be done with LIST activity ORDER BY timestamp within a GROUP BY case_id

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then group cases by their complete activity sequence the list to identify unique process variants Count number of cases per variant Determine top K variants by frequency number of cases

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Lets assume K is a parameter we need to incorporate it into query maybe as a variable Or we can use a CTE and rank functions

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Return all events from original event_log that belong only to cases which are part of the top K variants So we need to join back to original table

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Edge Cases multiple events with same timestamp Possibly ordering could be ambiguous But we will assume timestamp is unique per case or we accept any ordering but spec says order by timestamp

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Better to use ARRAY AGG activity ORDER BY timestamp to produce an array of activities

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Then group by variant array to count cases Then compute rank or dense rank by count descending filter top K Then join back to event_log using case_id that are in the top K variants

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need to be careful In variant_counts we group by variant_array but arrays might be large but it is fine

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: The problem top K variants by frequency if there are ties for the Kth position it might be ambiguous We can either include ties or break ties arbitrarily

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: I will use ROW NUMBER because it is simpler and returns exactly K rows

Name: Validation - PE
Text: For each case we aggregate activities order by timestamp Then group by that array to get counts Then rank by count descending Then get top K arrays then get cases having those arrays then join to get events
